name: agents
desc: 3 concurrent agents share a system prefix (tool schemas), each running 3 steps that append a step segment. Requests are listed turn-major (A0,A1,A2 step0; then step1; ...) so arrivals INTERLEAVE - the ReAct shape that makes a bounded cache thrash under FCFS and that cache-aware (longest-shared-prefix-first) scheduling fixes. Two-level sharing: the system prefix across agents + each agent's own growing chain.
sglang_published: two-level reuse (shared system + per-agent chain); cache-aware scheduling recovers the hit rate under interleaving
